heading: (intro)
raw: Written and directed by David Lynch
clean: Written and directed by David Lynch

heading: Betty Elms
raw: It'll be just like in the movies. Pretending to be somebody else.
clean: It'll be just like in the movies. Pretending to be somebody else.

heading: Diane Selwyn
raw: You want me to make this easy for you? No fucking way! It's not gonna be. It's not easy for me!
clean: You want me to make this easy for you? No fucking way! It's not gonna be. It's not easy for me!

heading: Rita
raw: What are you doing? We don't stop here.
clean: What are you doing? We don't stop here.

heading: Rita
raw: Silencio. No hay banda.
clean: Silencio. No hay banda.

heading: Adam Kesher
raw: I got the pool, she got the pool-man.
clean: I got the pool, she got the pool-man.

heading: Adam Kesher
raw: What picture? What are you talking about?
clean: What picture? What are you talking about?

heading: Adam Kesher
raw: This is the girl.
clean: This is the girl.

heading: The Cowboy
raw: Hey, pretty girl, time to wake up.
clean: Hey, pretty girl, time to wake up.

heading: Coco Lenoix
raw: Honey, you're a good kid, but what you're telling me is a load of horse puckey. Even though it comes from a good place.
clean: Honey, you're a good kid, but what you're telling me is a load of horse puckey. Even though it comes from a good place.

heading: Coco Lenoix
raw: Wilkins! Wilkins! If that damn dog craps in the courtyard one more time, I'm just gonna bake his little butt for breakfast!
clean: Wilkins! Wilkins! If that damn dog craps in the courtyard one more time, I'm just gonna bake his little butt for breakfast!

heading: Coco Lenoix
raw: You know, there was a man that lived here once that had a prize-fighting kangaroo. Well, you just wouldn't believe what that kangaroo did to this courtyard!
clean: You know, there was a man that lived here once that had a prize-fighting kangaroo. Well, you just wouldn't believe what that kangaroo did to this courtyard!

heading: Others
raw: Bondar: [at Club Silencio] No hay banda! There is no band. Il n'est pas de orquestra! This is all a tape-recording. No hay banda! And yet, we hear a band. If we want to hear a clarinette, listen. … It's all a tape. It is an illusion.
clean: No hay banda! There is no band. Il n'est pas de orquestra! This is all a tape-recording. No hay banda! And yet, we hear a band. If we want to hear a clarinette, listen. ... It's all a tape. It is an illusion.

heading: Others
raw: Blue-Haired Lady: Silencio …
clean: Silencio ...

heading: Dialogue
raw: Dan: I just wanted to come here.
clean: I just wanted to come here.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Herb: To Winkie's?
clean: To Winkie's?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Dan: This Winkie's.
clean: This Winkie's.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Herb: Okay, why this Winkie's?
clean: Okay, why this Winkie's?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Dan: It's kind of embarrassing.
clean: It's kind of embarrassing.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Herb: Go ahead.
clean: Go ahead.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Dan: I had a dream about this place.
clean: I had a dream about this place.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Herb: [slightly incredulous] Oh, boy.
clean: Oh, boy.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Dan: See what I mean?
clean: See what I mean?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Herb: Okay, so you had a dream about this place. Tell me.
clean: Okay, so you had a dream about this place. Tell me.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Herb: So you came to see if he's out there.
clean: So you came to see if he's out there.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Dan: To get rid of this god-awful feeling.
clean: To get rid of this god-awful feeling.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Herb: Right, then.
clean: Right, then.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Cynthia: Do you know somebody called "the Cowboy"?
clean: Do you know somebody called "the Cowboy"?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Adam Kesher: The Cowboy?
clean: The Cowboy?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Cynthia: Yeah, the Cowboy. This guy, the Cowboy, wants to see you. Jason said he thought it'd be a good idea.
clean: Yeah, the Cowboy. This guy, the Cowboy, wants to see you. Jason said he thought it'd be a good idea.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Adam Kesher: Oh, Jason thought it'd be a good idea for me to see the Cowboy. Well, should I wear my ten-gallon hat and my six-shooters?
clean: Oh, Jason thought it'd be a good idea for me to see the Cowboy. Well, should I wear my ten-gallon hat and my six-shooters?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Cowboy: Howdy.
clean: Howdy.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Adam Kesher: Howdy to you.
clean: Howdy to you.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Cowboy: Beautiful evening.
clean: Beautiful evening.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Adam Kesher: Yeah.
clean: Yeah.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Cowboy: Sure wanna thank you for coming all the way up here to see me from that nice little hotel downtown.
clean: Sure wanna thank you for coming all the way up here to see me from that nice little hotel downtown.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Adam Kesher: No problem. What's on your mind?
clean: No problem. What's on your mind?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Cowboy: Well, now. Here's a man who wants to get right down to it. Kind of anxious to get to it, are you?
clean: Well, now. Here's a man who wants to get right down to it. Kind of anxious to get to it, are you?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Cowboy: A man's attitude... a man's attitude goes some ways, the way his life will be. Is that something you might agree with?
clean: A man's attitude... a man's attitude goes some ways, the way his life will be. Is that something you might agree with?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Adam Kesher: Sure.
clean: Sure.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Cowboy: Now, did you answer because that's what you thought I wanted to hear, or did you think about what I said and answer 'cause you truly believe that to be right?
clean: Now, did you answer because that's what you thought I wanted to hear, or did you think about what I said and answer 'cause you truly believe that to be right?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Adam Kesher: I agree with what you said, truly.
clean: I agree with what you said, truly.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Cowboy: What'd I say?
clean: What'd I say?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Adam Kesher: That a man's attitude determines to a large extent how his life will be.
clean: That a man's attitude determines to a large extent how his life will be.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Cowboy: So since you agree, you must be a person who does not care about the good life.
clean: So since you agree, you must be a person who does not care about the good life.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Adam Kesher: How's that?
clean: How's that?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Cowboy: Well, stop for a little second and think about it. Can you do that for me?
clean: Well, stop for a little second and think about it. Can you do that for me?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Adam Kesher: [laughs] Okay, I'm thinking.
clean: Okay, I'm thinking.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Cowboy: ...No, you're not thinking. You're too busy being a smart-aleck to be thinking. Now, I want you to think and stop being a smart-aleck. Can you try that for me?
clean: ...No, you're not thinking. You're too busy being a smart-aleck to be thinking. Now, I want you to think and stop being a smart-aleck. Can you try that for me?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Cowboy: There's sometimes a buggy. How many drivers does a buggy have?
clean: There's sometimes a buggy. How many drivers does a buggy have?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Cowboy: So, let's just say I'm driving this buggy. And, if you fix your attitude, you can ride along with me.
clean: So, let's just say I'm driving this buggy. And, if you fix your attitude, you can ride along with me.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Betty: [after kissing Rita] Have you ever done this before?
clean: Have you ever done this before?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Rita: I don't know. Have you?
clean: I don't know. Have you?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Betty: I want to with you.
clean: I want to with you.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Luigi Castigliane: This is the girl.
clean: This is the girl.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Adam Kesher: Hey, that girl is not in my film!
clean: Hey, that girl is not in my film!

heading: Dialogue
raw: Vincenzo Castiliane: It's no longer your film.
clean: It's no longer your film.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Betty: What are you doing? We don't stop here.
clean: What are you doing? We don't stop here.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Driver: A surprise.
clean: A surprise.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Hitman: Now, once you hand that over to me, it's a done deal. Are you sure you want this?
clean: Now, once you hand that over to me, it's a done deal. Are you sure you want this?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Diane: More than anything in this world.
clean: More than anything in this world.
